name: @skastr0/pulsar-workspace
description: Deterministic, inspectable repository health signals and scoring.

scripts.verify: bun run typecheck && bun run test && bun run build
scripts.pack:dry-run: bun run build && npm pack --dry-run --workspace packages/core --workspace packages/project-module-sdk --workspace packages/shared-signals --workspace packages/ts-pack --workspace packages/rs-pack --workspace packages/project-module-effect --workspace packages/project-module-convex --workspace packages/project-module-nextjs
scripts.pack:npm-cli:dry-run: bun run build:npm-cli && npm pack --dry-run --workspace packages/npm/pulsar-darwin-arm64 --workspace packages/npm/pulsar-darwin-x64 --workspace packages/npm/pulsar-linux-arm64 --workspace packages/npm/pulsar-linux-x64 --workspace packages/npm/pulsar
